content: Is there support/plans to add support for multiple crates in a kernel module? Looks like the build system doesn't support this yet. The reason I want this is to ship my own proc macros with my module that are probably not useful enough to put into kernel/macros

I have a patch that precisely brings a fix for this, it was made with bindings crates in mind but it can also be used for other things. https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/20231104211213.225891-1-yakoyoku@gmail.com/T/#u
The only issue is that it's lacking a bit of traction. :grimacing:
I can't say at a glance that it'll work for proc macro because they have to be built as a host lib. But I will give this a try later and see. thank you :)
